name: Molasses Rum Wash
notes: Base ratio (~8.5 gal): 6.5 gal water, 1 gal molasses, 8 lb sugar, 1 gal cold water. 40-gal batch = ~4.7x base; 150-gal = ~17.6x base. Molasses + cane sugar wash.

name: Agave Spirit Wash
notes: Latest recipe (05/18/2026, 40 gal): 5 gal agave nectar, 18 lb cane sugar, 80 g Superferm BSG nutrient, 1 cup yeast, water to 40 gal. OG ~1.069, potential ABV ~9% if fermented dry, target FG ~1.000, ferment 78-86F, starting pH 4.8-5.2. Earlier batches used calcium carbonate to buffer pH. Original 7-gal ratio: 12 cups agave nectar, 2 lb sugar, 5.5 gal water.

name: Rye Whiskey Mash
notes: Base ratio (6 gal): 6 gal water, 7 lb rye, 4 lb corn, 1.5 lb barley (40-gal = 6.667x). Mash schedule: add grain at 115F strike; glucan rest 110F/20min; protein rest 136F/20min; 152F/90min; then 158F/30min for alpha-amylase.
